title: Magnificently Indulgent Russian Chocolate Chip Blini
description: Savory Russian blini filled with chocolate chips, perfect for a shattering indulgent treat, and can be adapted to be shojin-friendly by using plant-based chocolate chips.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together almond milk, eggs, and melted butter.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Fold in the chocolate chips and vanilla extract.
Heat a non-stick skillet or blini pan over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the skillet or pan.
Cook the blini for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the blini and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the blini warm, garnished with additional chocolate chips if desired.
